acceptance_rules.agent_state_differentiation_gate: train-only state must be closer to full-data state than default or wrong-user state
acceptance_rules.agent_state_similarity: mean across users >= 0.8 (no baseline significance required)
acceptance_rules.agent_state_similarity_detail: mean of per-user means across strategies; threshold on global mean; not a baseline contrast
acceptance_rules.behavioral_majority_baseline_gate: formal acceptance blocks when train-majority behavioral baseline matches or beats personality
acceptance_rules.behavioral_similarity_strategy: formal paired Wilcoxon one-sided greater vs baseline C; external-human 3-class classifier gate is required before this can count as hard evidence
acceptance_rules.classifier_gate: formal acceptance requires external_human_labeled train/gate labels, class minima, separation, non-TFIDF embedding engine, cue override <= threshold, without-cue 3-class macro-F1 gate pass, and overall 3-class macro-F1 gate pass; LLM-generated provisional labels are usable for engineering/direction checks only
acceptance_rules.diagnostic_trace_gate: formal acceptance requires non-empty diagnostic trace and audit summaries
acceptance_rules.formal_baseline_c: Baseline C must use leave-one-out population averaging via population_average_full_implant; profile_only_average_fallback and skip_population_average_implant are test-only
acceptance_rules.partial_acceptance: LLM-generated provisional labels may support partial acceptance when semantic engine, statistics, split coverage, Baseline C reproducibility, and diagnostic trace gates pass; partial acceptance is not formal acceptance
acceptance_rules.per_strategy_comparisons: same Wilcoxon rules computed separately per split strategy (see per_strategy_comparisons)
acceptance_rules.pilot: run_pilot_validation estimates sd of per-user semantic (personality vs baseline A) and behavioral (personality vs baseline C) mean differences; suggested_min_users uses max of thresholds when either exceeds pilot_sd_threshold
acceptance_rules.semantic_embedding_gate: formal acceptance requires sentence_embedding_cosine; TF-IDF fallback is development-only
acceptance_rules.semantic_similarity: formal paired Wilcoxon one-sided greater vs baseline A and baseline C (p < 0.05) with mean paired diff > 0; one paired sample per user (mean across split strategies)
acceptance_rules.statistical_engine: scipy.stats.wilcoxon(alternative='greater'); no fallback p-values are valid for formal acceptance
acceptance_rules.surface_ablation_gate: formal acceptance requires full personality generation to significantly beat no-surface, no-policy, and surface-only ablations on semantic-vs-baseline-C deltas, and every ablation must remain below full
acceptance_rules.topic_gate: topic_split_not_applicable users are excluded from topic statistics, but valid topic users must still meet required_users

agent_state_differentiation_gate.policy: train-only state must be closer to full-data state than default or wrong-user state

baseline_c_behavioral_failure_audit.policy: diagnostic distribution audit for Baseline C and train-majority behavioral baselines

behavioral_majority_baseline_gate.policy: formal acceptance blocks when train-majority behavioral baseline matches or beats personality

debug_readiness_gate.policy: debug-only gate for state/profile differentiation before mini-formal

partial_acceptance_gate.policy: partial acceptance may use llm_generated_provisional classifier labels when foundational engineering evidence is present; hard/formal acceptance still requires external_human_labeled classifier evidence

semantic_engine_gate.policy: formal acceptance requires sentence_embedding_cosine for personality semantic metrics

surface_ablation_gate.policy: formal acceptance requires full personality generation to beat no-surface, no-policy, and surface-only ablations on semantic-vs-baseline-C paired Wilcoxon, with every ablation below full
